study_set.name: Soil microbiome of Miscanthus x giganteus at LAMPS Study Site
study_set.description:
SSU rRNA RNA library of soil microbiome sampled from LAMPS. Complement dataset to SSU rRNA DNA described in Ma et al, 2021.

https://apsjournals.apsnet.org/doi/full/10.1094/PBIOMES-01-20-0014-FI
